description: Precision agriculture can aid in reducing inputs for crop production. Course provides an overview of precision agriculture technologies and will cover Global Positioning Systems, Geographic Information Systems, variable rate technology, section/flow control, soil and yield mapping, and guidance systems. Economics of the different technologies will be discussed. Previous experience with precision agriculture systems is not required.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Foundations of Farm Management or Farm and Equipment Operations certificate program

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Foundations of Farm Management or Farm and Equipment Operations certificate program
